name: Bug Report

## Environment

- **Synoema version:** (`sno --version`)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Rust toolchain:** (`rustc --version`)

## Minimal Reproduction

```sno
-- Paste minimal .sno code that reproduces the bug
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full compiler error output if applicable.

## Compiler Output

```
-- Paste full error output here
```

## Additional Context

Any other information (screenshots, related issues, etc.).
